# Cenk Kurtoglu — Next.js Template Bundle

> A $79 collection of 20 adaptable Next.js and Tailwind CSS starter templates for developers, freelancers, and agencies that want a visual head start without beginning from a blank page.

## Verified product

- Product: 20 Next.js + Tailwind CSS Template Bundle
- Current price: $79 USD
- Stack represented by the inspected package: Next.js 15.1, React 19, Tailwind CSS 3.4, TypeScript
- Delivery: digital source ZIPs through Gumroad after purchase
- Intended use: adaptable starting points for business sites and client work
- Important: demo content, third-party services, forms, authentication, payments, CMS, and production integrations require buyer configuration where applicable
- No guaranteed revenue, conversion, or client-acquisition outcomes are claimed

## Review before purchase

- Clean product overview: https://cekuu35.github.io/nextjs-template-bundle/
- Public catalog with all 20 demo links: https://github.com/cekuu35/nextjs-website-templates#all-20-templates
- Direct checkout: https://cengokurtoglu.gumroad.com/l/vuhstz?utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=geo&utm_campaign=bundle79

## Free sample

- Free MIT-licensed Next.js CV template: https://github.com/cekuu35/free-nextjs-cv-template
- Live free demo: https://free-nextjs-cv-template.vercel.app
